overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a gothic-style classroom interior from a video game, featuring students in robes studying at wooden desks beneath vaulted ceilings and ornate chandeliers. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or action, capturing the atmospheric lighting of a medieval academic hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with tiered wooden desks and vaulted ceiling

student sitting at desk facing the front of the classroom

elaborate iron chandeliers hanging from chains
tall arched windows with multiple panes letting in natural light
large ornate wooden door with metal studs at the far end of the hall
long wooden desks with attached benches arranged in rows
decorative stone archway surrounding the central door
tall wooden bookcases against the right wall

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a gothic classroom interior with students in robes seated at wooden study desks. Ornate iron chandeliers hang from the vaulted wooden ceiling, while tall arched windows on the left wall provide diffused natural lighting. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric stillness of the medieval academic hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a gothic classroom that maintains a sense of timeless academic stillness. It begins with a wide perspective of students in robes seated at wooden study desks, anchored by the heavy presence of the medieval furniture. The gaze lingers on the ornate iron chandeliers suspended from the vaulted wooden ceiling, while diffused natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left wall. The scene remains completely motionless, preserving the quiet gravity of the hall as the light and shadows hold their position across the interior.
